output.answer: The Hindu Kush mountains are located at approximately 35°N, 71°E, spanning regions of Afghanistan, Pakistan, and Tajikistan in Central Asia.
output.formatted:
The Hindu Kush mountains are located at approximately 35°N, 71°E, spanning regions of Afghanistan, Pakistan, and Tajikistan in Central Asia.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?coordinate WHERE {
  wd:Q5472 wdt:P625 ?coordinate
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| coordinate                                  |
| ------------------------------------------- |
| POINT(71.000000 35.000000) (geo:wktLiteral) |
